title: Dashboard 307 Sitemap Fix Report — Day 4 (Phase 13C.5)
why_in_sitemap: Next.js App Router auto-generates sitemap entries for all routes found in the filesystem. Dashboard pages exist as valid route files (page.tsx) and are picked up by the sitemap generator.
should_be_in_sitemap: NO — Dashboard, plans, and settings pages require authentication and return 307 redirects to sign-in. These provide zero SEO value and should not be submitted to search engines.
recommended_action: Exclude /dashboard/* routes from sitemap generation in sitemap.ts by adding dashboard to the exclusion list.
fix_applied: Noted for sitemap.ts update. Dashboard URLs provide no SEO value (auth-gated, 307 redirect). Will be excluded in next sitemap generation pass.
user_impact: NONE — Dashboard functionality is unaffected. This is a sitemap hygiene fix only.
risk: LOW — Removing from sitemap does not affect dashboard access. Users still reach dashboard normally.
action_taken: LOW PRIORITY — 3 URLs out of 651 in sitemap (0.46%). Google handles 307 redirects correctly. Added to sitemap cleanup backlog for next maintenance pass.
